use_cases: Displaying stock price trends over time with smooth area chart visualization
Financial dashboard metric tracking with interactive hover tooltips
Revenue or growth data visualization for business analytics
Portfolio performance tracking with date-based filtering
Market data comparison and historical trend analysis
ai_summary: A financial area chart component that visualizes stock market data (Apple stock prices) using smooth curves and interactive tooltips. Built with visx/shape and visx/scale for performant SVG-based rendering, it displays time-series data with gradient fills and dark theme styling. Features hover-based tooltips showing precise values and dates, making it ideal for fintech dashboards and financial data analysis applications.
